title: Vendor updates
body:
* pin branches to releases or commits
* remove unused dependencies
* add vendor checks to the CI to make sure everything's in sync

comments.body: Got it now. Had to specify the language in the Travis file to have a proper GOPATH. Otherwise, vndr will just delete everything. I also wanted to run it before building the container.
@mtrmac, I think it's ready to go.

LGTM… although I didn’t review the `vendor` version changes in detail (the very first one seems to backward quite a bit?!); I do hope someone has reviewed that in libpod.

Thanks!
